name: Ranch Style Brunch Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a large frypan until crisp. Drain and reserve 3 tablespoons of drippings.
2. Sauté the potatoes in the reserved drippings until browned, about 10 minutes.
3. Divide the potatoes among 4 individual greased 1-cup shallow baking dishes.
4. Sprinkle with cheese and bacon pieces on top of the potatoes.
5. Beat together the eggs, milk, and green onions; pour into the dishes.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until set.
7. Garnish as desired.
